select_when: Small interventions could create outsized effects because feedback loops, delays, or threshold crossings dominate the system.
Local optimization may improve one metric while degrading the wider system over time.
The current plan assumes straight-line cause and effect even though the environment is full of interacting parts.
The team needs to map reinforcing and balancing loops before deciding where to intervene.
avoid_when: Complexity language is being used to avoid naming concrete levers, checkpoints, or experiments.
The case is stable and sequential enough that a simpler one-step causal model already explains the decision.
